title: Question: Tracing C Example - Fails to Build with MSYS2
body:
---


Author Name: **Travis Ayres**
Original Redmine Message: 2614 from https://www.veripool.org



---

```
$make

-- Verilator tracing example

-- VERILATE ----------------
verilator  -cc --exe -O2 -x-assign 0 -Wall --trace --assert --coverage -f input.vc top.v sim_main.cpp

-- COMPILE -----------------
make -j 4 -C obj_dir -f ../Makefile_obj
make[1]: Entering directory '/d/projects/verilator/tracing_c/obj_dir'
x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++  -I.  -MMD -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVL_PRINTF=printf -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -faligned-new -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1 -O2 -fstrict-aliasing -c -o sim_main.o ../sim_main.cpp
x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++  -I.  -MMD -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVL_PRINTF=printf -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -faligned-new -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1  -c -o verilated.o /mingw64/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++  -I.  -MMD -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVL_PRINTF=printf -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -faligned-new -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1  -c -o verilated_cov.o /mingw64/share/verilator/include/verilated_cov.cpp
x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++  -I.  -MMD -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include -I/mingw64/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVL_PRINTF=printf -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -faligned-new -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1  -c -o verilated_vcd_c.o /mingw64/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.cpp
../sim_main.cpp: In function 'int main(int, char**, char**)':
../sim_main.cpp:54:27: error: too many arguments to function 'int mkdir(const char*)'
          mkdir("logs", 0777);
                            ^
In file included from C:/msys64/mingw64/x86_64-w64-mingw32/include/unistd.h:10,
                  from C:/msys64/mingw64/share/verilator/include/verilatedos.h:250,
                  from C:/msys64/mingw64/share/verilator/include/verilated.h:32,
                  from ../sim_main.cpp:8:
C:/msys64/mingw64/x86_64-w64-mingw32/include/io.h:280:15: note: declared here
    int __cdecl mkdir (const char *) __MINGW_ATTRIB_DEPRECATED_MSVC2005;
                ^~~~~
../sim_main.cpp:115:23: error: too many arguments to function 'int mkdir(const char*)'
      mkdir("logs", 0777);
                        ^
In file included from C:/msys64/mingw64/x86_64-w64-mingw32/include/unistd.h:10,
                  from C:/msys64/mingw64/share/verilator/include/verilatedos.h:250,
                  from C:/msys64/mingw64/share/verilator/include/verilated.h:32,
                  from ../sim_main.cpp:8:
C:/msys64/mingw64/x86_64-w64-mingw32/include/io.h:280:15: note: declared here
    int __cdecl mkdir (const char *) __MINGW_ATTRIB_DEPRECATED_MSVC2005;
                ^~~~~
make[1]: *** [Vtop.mk:59: sim_main.o] Error 1
make[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
make[1]: Leaving directory '/d/projects/verilator/tracing_c/obj_dir'
make: *** [Makefile:66: run] Error 2


```

Does the example need an updated #define for the MSYS2 platform? I just removed the mkdir and made the directories myself, but then I wasn't getting a valid *.vcd file to view in GTKWAVE, so I thought I'd ask.

Thanks everyone!
